name: Narendra Modi
title: Prime Minister of India

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Quad partnership and growing defense-technology cooperation
Legacy defense procurement relationship and energy imports
Border disputes and strategic competition in the Indo-Pacific

biography: Narendra Modi transformed Indian politics through a potent mix of Hindu nationalist ideology and technocratic modernization. His ESTJ temperament manifests in decisive executive action, a focus on tangible deliverables like infrastructure and digital identity, and a hierarchical management style. He seeks to position India as a leading pole in a multipolar world order.
